name: fire-extinguisher-system
description: Fire Extinguisher Management System - Full-stack microservice application

scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,auth,asset,service-req,notification,reporting,frontend -c blue,green,red,white,gray,brightBlue,brightYellow "npm run dev -w @fems/api-gateway" "npm run dev -w @fems/auth-service" "npm run dev -w @fems/asset-service" "npm run dev -w @fems/service-request-service" "npm run dev -w @fems/notification-service" "npm run dev -w @fems/reporting-service" "npm run dev -w @fems/frontend"
scripts.dev:services: concurrently -n gateway,auth,asset,service-req,notification,reporting -c blue,green,red,white,gray,brightBlue "npm run dev -w @fems/api-gateway" "npm run dev -w @fems/auth-service" "npm run dev -w @fems/asset-service" "npm run dev -w @fems/service-request-service" "npm run dev -w @fems/notification-service" "npm run dev -w @fems/reporting-service"
scripts.docs: npm run build -w @fems/shared && npm run dev -w @fems/api-gateway
scripts.docs:all: npm run build -w @fems/shared && npm run dev
scripts.test:unit: npm run test -w @fems/shared && npm run test -w @fems/auth-service
